waves.name: foundation
review_gate: All must-read files were reviewed and constraints were captured for downstream waves

checklist.name: audit app shell entrypoints
checklist.description: Review the main application entrypoints and shared layout constraints before implementation begins
acceptance_criteria: The main app shell entrypoints have been identified
Shared layout constraints are documented for later waves
verification: Notes reference App.tsx and routes.tsx with the relevant layout constraints

checklist.name: audit global styling setup
checklist.description: Review the global styling system and existing conventions used across the app
acceptance_criteria: Global styling conventions are identified
Responsive breakpoints and reusable utilities are documented
verification: Notes reference global.css and summarize the relevant styling conventions

waves.name: independent feature implementation
review_gate: Each feature task has passing task-local verification
The completed feature outputs are ready for integration in the next wave

checklist.name: implement navigation component
checklist.description: Build the navigation component without depending on hero section implementation
acceptance_criteria: The navigation component renders the expected structure
The mobile menu toggle behavior is implemented

checklist.name: implement hero component
checklist.description: Build the hero section independently from navigation work
acceptance_criteria: The hero component renders the headline, supporting text, and CTA
The hero layout behaves correctly at target breakpoints
verification: Component-level tests for the hero pass

checklist.name: implement footer component
checklist.description: Build the footer independently from navigation and hero work
acceptance_criteria: The footer component renders the required links and copyright text
The footer component is ready for integration
verification: Component-level tests for the footer pass

waves.name: integration
review_gate: All integrated components work together in the app shell
Integration verification is green before the final verification wave begins

checklist.name: wire navigation into app shell
checklist.description: Integrate the completed navigation component into the main app layout
acceptance_criteria: Navigation is rendered in the app shell
Responsive behavior still works after integration
verification: Integration checks covering navigation in context pass

checklist.name: wire hero into landing page
checklist.description: Integrate the completed hero component into the landing page layout
acceptance_criteria: Hero is placed in the correct section order
Spacing remains correct in the integrated page
verification: Integration checks covering hero placement pass
steps: Import Hero into the landing page
Place component in correct section order

checklist.name: wire footer into app shell
checklist.description: Integrate the completed footer component into the main app layout
acceptance_criteria: Footer is rendered at the bottom of the integrated layout
Spacing remains correct after integration
verification: Integration checks covering footer placement pass
steps: Place component at bottom of layout

waves.name: verification
review_gate: The feature is ready for a fresh review session

checklist.name: test navigation behavior
checklist.description: Verify navigation works correctly after integration
acceptance_criteria: Desktop navigation works
Mobile menu toggle works
Navigation links behave correctly

checklist.name: test hero rendering
checklist.description: Verify hero content renders correctly after integration
acceptance_criteria: Headline and subhead render correctly
CTA visibility and alignment are correct
Responsive layout works

checklist.name: test footer rendering
checklist.description: Verify footer content renders correctly after integration
acceptance_criteria: Footer links render correctly
Layout works at multiple breakpoints
No console errors are introduced
